title: Port declaration of ha_sum inherits dimensions from var/net

features.name: implicit wire from typo in continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment using an undeclared identifier that creates an implicit wire

features.name: output port without explicit type defaulting to uwire
features.description: Code should include an output port declaration without an explicit type keyword, defaulting to uwire behavior

features.name: uwire with multiple drivers from implicit wire collision
features.description: Code should include a uwire that receives multiple drivers including an implicit wire from a typo
